subject: reporting line for sydney risk officer

emails.subject: Re: Reporting Line for Sydney Risk Officer
emails.subject_base: Reporting Line for Sydney Risk Officer
emails.body: Re: Reporting Line for Sydney Risk Officer Since a majority of the activity is power related, I would imagine that Justin should roll into the overall power group in London. They may have other ideas! The mid-year reviews were localized to Sydney only, will this be different at year end? SRM HEIDI MASON@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 11/16/2000 04:50 PM

emails.subject: Re: Reporting Line for Sydney Risk Officer
emails.subject_base: Reporting Line for Sydney Risk Officer
emails.body: I think that it makes perfect sense now that Sydney rolls into London. Sally and I have discussed this in the past and she will concur. Hope all is well! SRM HEIDI MASON@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 11/16/2000 07:37 PM

emails.subject: Re: Reporting Line for Sydney Risk Officer
emails.subject_base: Reporting Line for Sydney Risk Officer
emails.body: I dont know how 'international' the year end review will be. I will contact Mike Jordan directly and find out specifically who the line should be. I have discussed it with Mike when I was in London and his only concern was that the move to London was in line with Sally's understanding and that you and she was comfortable with it. Thanks for your help on this. With thanks Heidi Scott Mills@ECT 17/11/2000 11:29 AM

emails.subject: Re: Reporting Line for Sydney Risk Officer
emails.subject_base: Reporting Line for Sydney Risk Officer
emails.body: Many thanks to all for this rapid resolution. It was a little awkward when we could not tell our new starter what his functional line was! With thanks Heidi Scott Mills@ECT 18/11/2000 01:34 AM
